title: chrysopogon fulvibarbis
intro: Chrysopogon fulvibarbis, also known as Vetiver or Khas, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. Chrysopogon fulvibarbis can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or dried root, making it a versatile herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and overall well-being.
